title: Conditional for blocking the triggering of an automation if there is a pending instance
excerpt:
The monday should have a conditional for blocking the triggering of an automation if there is a pending instance. 
When the Monday environment is slow and automations take time, prevent the user from clicking the button …

posts.author: Pcallegari (Patrícia)
posts.cookedHtml:
The monday should have a conditional for blocking the triggering of an automation if there is a pending instance.
When the Monday environment is slow and automations take time, prevent the user from clicking the button more than once or ignoring an action when there is already one pending.

We are having this issue with our users.
